glossary.definition: A ring-shaped passage: fluid moves in the gap between two concentric surfaces (for example between an outer duct wall and an inner core or plug). It is used to route bypass air, condition shocks, or feed gas around a central module before it rejoins a core or nozzle.

A short fluidic insert or multi-port cavity whose job is to tame abrupt pressure spikes (blasts or strong shocks) so upstream hardware sees gentler gradients. In a diagram it is treated as an assembly: annulus path, detuner core geometry, and structural/sealing hardware—even when CAD is merged into one mesh.

A supersonic nozzle with a converging section, a minimum-area throat, and a diverging section. The stub mesh in FG is one envelope; operationally it still has an inlet plenum interface, the contoured CD passage, and exit flanges/struts.

fluid_and_electrical_services.title: Cryo piping, fuel distribution, decals, HV umbilical

fuel_gas_distribution.title: Fuel gas distribution (one mesh — three service assemblies)

pipe_h2_feed.title: H2 feed line assembly
pipe_h2_feed.detail: H2-compatible tubing, filters, flex section, and fittings sized for hydrogen service; terminates in connectors toward the reactor manifold / grid region.

pipe_ch4_feed.title: CH4 feed line assembly
pipe_ch4_feed.detail: Cryogenic methane-rated line from the methane tank to the blend manifold; includes thermal breaks and service valves (concept).

pipe_b2h6_feed.title: B2H6 / blend feed line assembly
pipe_b2h6_feed.detail: Low-flow diborane or blend line with compatible seals and trace heating where needed; joins the CH4/H2 plumbing tree (concept).

fusion_hot_gas_outlet.title: Core exhaust / outlet plane
fusion_hot_gas_outlet.detail: Working fluid and enthalpy exit from the fusion package toward the CD nozzle; not a separate AC object—shown for attachment topology only.

bd_annulus_path.title: Annulus flow path
bd_annulus_path.detail: Ring-shaped bypass / conditioning passage carrying compressor or bypass air around the core before it meets the detuner throat or re-enters the core periphery.

bd_shock_detuner_core.title: Shock detuner core
bd_shock_detuner_core.detail: Shaped insert or multi-port cavity that softens or redirects shocks so downstream structures (magnet, grid, nozzle interface) see bounded gradients.

bd_brackets_seals.title: Detuner structure, seals, and interfaces
bd_brackets_seals.detail: Load path hardware, seals, and flanges that tie the detuner insert to the duct shell and to the nozzle / reactor hardpoints.

blast_detuner_assembly.title: Blast detuner module (single mesh — multi-part function)

nozzle_inlet_plenum.title: Nozzle inlet plenum / adapter
nozzle_inlet_plenum.detail: Turns the reactor outlet / bay flow into a uniform annulus or round feed for the CD contour; carries structural interface to the reactor shell.

nozzle_cd_contour.title: CD contour / throat region
nozzle_cd_contour.detail: Converging section, minimum-area throat, and start of divergent flaps—supersonic design intent even if merged in one mesh.

nozzle_exit_hardware.title: Exit hardware & flange
nozzle_exit_hardware.detail: Exit struts, flange to thrust frame, and instrumentation bosses at the nozzle tail.

reactor_bay.title: Reactor bay (fusion core inside the engine flowpath)

air_breathing_engine.title: Air-breathing engine (reactor module embedded in the duct)
